## API Reference

## Packages

|  Package | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  [@empathyco/x-adapter](./x-adapter.md) | Search-adapter library with the search API adapter. The library contains the custom Empathy adapter and typing. |
|  [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) | X-Components is a library usable everywhere not only for search experiences. |
|  [@empathyco/x-types](./x-types.md) | Search-types library with the search API models. It also includes model schemas for testing purpose. |
